task_scope.requested_deliverable: Determine if R004236 and R004237 constitute split reimbursement within 7 days

audit_period: based on expense dates of R004236 and R004237

policy_questions.question: What is the policy rule on split reimbursement (拆分报销)? What is the 7-day rule and amount threshold?

boundaries.dates: expense_date of two records within 7 days
boundaries.conditions: same employee, same expense type, same vendor, within 7 days

data_questions.question: What are the details of R004236 and R004237 (employee, expense_date, amount, expense_type, vendor, status)?
What is the date difference between the two records' expense dates?
Are both records from the same employee?

evidence_requirements: Expense details for R004236 and R004237
Policy clause on split reimbursement / 7-day rule

execution_steps.description: Search policy for split reimbursement / 7-day rule
Retrieve expense details for R004236 and R004237
Calculate date interval and check conditions for split reimbursement

reasons: Single known-record task (R004236, R004237) with one rule (split reimbursement within 7 days)
No aggregation, grouping, or batch filtering
Simple date comparison and amount sum

stopping_conditions: Policy rule on split reimbursement identified
Determination made: anomaly or no anomaly
